case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. NORMAN AMADOR

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMADOR, NORMAN $10,815.98 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $452.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,067.98, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
